name: Coniglio Alla Cassia
recipeIngredient: 1 large Ripe tomato or 1/2 cup Canned peeled plum tomatoes (chopped)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the rabbit into 6 pieces and wash it well.
2. Chop the liver into very small pieces.
3. Heat olive oil and butter in a saucepan.
4. Add diced salt pork; cook until lightly browned.
5. Add onions and cook to medium brown.
6. Add rabbit pieces and brown for 10 minutes.
7. Add garlic, bay leaves, black pepper, and chopped liver.
8. Stir and cook for another 10 minutes.
9. Pour in the dry red wine and stir; cover and cook for 5 minutes.
10. Uncover and add chopped tomato and hot water.
11. Stir and cook slowly for about 1 hour.
12. Test for doneness; do not overcook.
13. Carefully taste for salt (optional) and adjust if needed.
14. When cooked, keep the rabbit warm until serving time.
15. Spoon the sauce over both rabbit and pasta.
SOURCE: Leone's Italian Cookbook
